description: Composition Blue shirt made of cotton, that has long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar with a buttoned front placket, patch pocket on left chest and a curved hem Fitting Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash Do not tumble dry Turn inside out and dry in shade Warm iron, but do not iron on print/embroidery A classic piece of design, this blue shirt from belmonte can be worn with a blazer and jeans, or formal pants for reliable style. It's wash-and-wear property makes this blue formal shirt a great addition to your wardrobe. Model statistics The model wears size M in shirts Height-6'3”, Shoulders-19"
